name: Authentication backend session exchange
description: Implement backend auth exchange, refresh, and logout endpoints that verify Firebase identity, map a local user, issue application tokens, and manage refresh-session lifecycle according to docs/product-specs/authentication.md.
evidence: 2026-04-22: implemented POST /api/v1/auth/logout with auth-middleware protection and current-session revocation, added integration coverage for missing-bearer logout, logout revocation, protected-route rejection after logout, and refresh replay failure after logout, then verified with pnpm --filter worker lint, pnpm --filter worker typecheck, pnpm --filter worker test, and full ./init.sh.
